title: Revert "[ImportVerilog] Add initial virtual interface lowering (#9904)"

features.name: virtual interface variable declaration
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface variable declaration in a module or class scope

features.name: virtual interface assignment to instance
features.description: Code should include assignment of a virtual interface handle to a concrete interface instance

features.name: virtual interface signal access
features.description: Code should include access to an interface signal through a virtual interface handle

features.name: virtual interface task method call
features.description: Code should include a task method call through a virtual interface handle

features.name: virtual interface as module port
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface passed as a module or class port parameter

features.name: virtual interface array declaration
features.description: Code should include an array of virtual interface handles

features.name: virtual interface in class property
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface declared as a class property

features.name: virtual interface with clocking block
features.description: Code should include a clocking block inside an interface accessed via a virtual interface

features.name: null assignment to virtual interface
features.description: Code should include assigning null to a virtual interface handle
features.snippet:
virtual MyIface vif;
initial vif = null;

features.name: virtual interface equality comparison
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison between two virtual interface handles
features.snippet:
virtual MyIface v1, v2;
initial if (v1 == v2) ;
